lot of people I've heard stories about
oh we had the wrong people in the seats
okay I can get behind that and I said
well what are you doing now and they'll
say well there's such a great amount of
salespeople out there we can now find
you know rock stars and and A+ players
and I'm like okay but are you going to
hire those people again too isn't part
of the challenge not just them but maybe
you and maybe before you think about
that or when you start to hire what's
missing is they don't know how to
communicate well there's no Humanity
here their communication skills they
haven't earned the right to ask
questions I saw in training orgs get cut
I saw training budgets get cut that's
the most important part so please before
you think you're just going to hire
those A-list players make sure you
employ a complete strategy and think
